2604.06989.title: Generative Phomosaic with Structure-Aligned and Personalized Diffusion
2604.06989.paper_summary: We present the first generative approach to photomosaic creation. Traditional photomosaic methods rely on a large number of tile images and color-based matching, which limits both diversity and structural consistency. Our generative photomosaic framework synthesizes tile images using diffusion-based generation conditioned on reference images. A low-frequency conditioned diffusion mechanism aligns global structure while preserving prompt-driven details. This generative formulation enables photomosaic composition that is both semantically expressive and structurally coherent, effectively overcoming the fundamental limitations of matching-based approaches. By leveraging few-shot personalized diffusion, our model is able to produce user-specific or stylistically consistent tiles without requiring an extensive collection of images.
2604.06989.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了第一種生成式的照片馬賽克創建方法。傳統的照片馬賽克方法依賴大量的瓷磚圖像和基於顏色的匹配，這限制了多樣性和結構一致性。我們的生成式照片馬賽克框架使用基於擴散的生成來合成瓷磚圖像，並以參考圖像為條件。低頻條件擴散機制對齊全球結構，同時保留基於提示的細節。這種生成式公式使得照片馬賽克的組合既具有語意表達性，又結構一致，有效克服了基於匹配方法的基本限制。通過利用少量個性化擴散，我們的模型能夠在不需要大量圖像集合的情況下，生成用戶特定或風格一致的瓷磚。
2604.06989.author: Jaeyoung Chung et.al.
2604.06989.authors: Jaeyoung Chung, Hyunjin Son, Kyoung Mu Lee
